Areas We Cover

Serving Buckinghamshire & Beyond

Based in Amersham, we provide our premium landscaping services across Buckinghamshire and the surrounding Home Counties. We're local, so we're never far away.

Local

Amersham

HP6, HP7

Our home base. We know Amersham properties inside out, from period homes in Old Amersham to modern developments.

Local landmarks:

Amersham Old TownSt Mary's ChurchAmersham Museum
3 miles

Chesham

HP5

Serving Chesham and surrounding villages with the same dedication to quality craftsmanship.

Local landmarks:

Chesham Town CentreLowndes ParkThe Elgiva Theatre
6 miles

Beaconsfield

HP9

Creating beautiful outdoor spaces for Beaconsfield homeowners, from New Town to Old Town.

Local landmarks:

Beaconsfield Old TownBekonscot Model VillageRoyal Standard
4 miles

Chalfont St Giles

HP8

Proud to serve this charming Buckinghamshire village with premium landscaping services.

Local landmarks:

Milton's CottageThe VacheChalfont St Giles Village
2 miles

Little Chalfont

HP7

Transforming gardens in Little Chalfont with porcelain patios, decking, and glass balustrades.

Local landmarks:

Little Chalfont StationChalfont ParkLocal Nature Reserve
8 miles

Great Missenden

HP16

Bringing our expertise to Great Missenden and the surrounding Chiltern villages.

Local landmarks:

Roald Dahl MuseumMissenden AbbeyChiltern Hills
5 miles

Chorleywood

WD3

Serving Chorleywood with the same family-run service and attention to detail.

Local landmarks:

Chorleywood CommonChorleywood StationLocal Golf Club
10 miles

High Wycombe

HP10-HP15

Extending our services to High Wycombe and the surrounding areas.

Local landmarks:

Wycombe SwanHughenden ManorThe Chilterns

Not Sure If We Cover Your Area?

We're based in Amersham and typically work within a 15-mile radius. If you're in Buckinghamshire, Hertfordshire, or nearby counties, get in touch – we may still be able to help with your project.

Check Your AreaCall Us
Serving:
Amersham, Chesham, Beaconsfield, Chalfont St Giles, Little Chalfont, Great Missenden, Chorleywood & High Wycombe

We primarily serve the following counties:

BuckinghamshireHertfordshireMiddlesexOxfordshire
OLIVER CHARLESGARDEN DESIGN & BUILD

Family-run garden design and build specialists in Amersham, Buckinghamshire. Transforming outdoor spaces with porcelain patios, composite decking, and glass balustrades since 2015.

Amersham, Buckinghamshire
